about.title: About Taizhou City Huangyan Oya Plastic Factory
about.subtitle: Over 20 Years of Excellence in Baby Feeding Solutions
about.intro: Established in {year}, Taizhou City Huangyan Oya Plastic Factory is a professional manufacturer specializing in baby feeding bottles, sippy cups, tableware, and related baby products. With over {experience} years of experience, we have developed deep expertise in plastic injection molding, especially {materials} materials. Our commitment to quality and innovation has made us a trusted partner for brands worldwide.
about.manufacturingText: All manufacturing and packaging processes are completed in-house, ensuring high-quality items for all clients. Our integrated production approach allows us to maintain strict quality control at every stage—from raw material inspection to final packaging.
about.oem: Original Equipment Manufacturing for well-known brands
about.odm: Original Design Manufacturing with custom product development
about.certificationsIntro: Our products meet international quality standards. We are proud to hold the following certifications that demonstrate our commitment to excellence.
about.ctaText: We warmly welcome customers to visit our factory for on-site audits and inspections. Experience our manufacturing capabilities firsthand and discover why we are the trusted choice for baby product solutions.
about.ctaClosing: Looking forward to be your partner!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our baby products

items.question: Are your products BPA-free and safe for babies?
items.answer: Yes, all our products are made from BPA-free, non-toxic materials. We use food-grade PP, PPSU, and silicone that meet international safety standards including FDA, LFGB, and EN14350. Safety is our top priority for your little ones.

items.question: What materials do you use for your feeding bottles?
items.answer: We offer feeding bottles in three materials: PPSU (polyphenylsulfone) known for its durability and heat resistance, PP (polypropylene) for lightweight everyday use, and glass for parents who prefer natural materials. All are free from harmful chemicals.

items.question: Do you ship internationally?
items.answer: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by location. International orders typically arrive within 7-14 business days. You can view exact shipping costs at checkout before placing your order.

items.question: What is your return and refund policy?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging. If you receive a defective product, we will replace it free of charge. Please contact our customer service team to initiate a return or exchange.

items.question: Are your products dishwasher and sterilizer safe?
items.answer: Most of our products are dishwasher safe (top rack recommended) and compatible with standard sterilizers. However, we recommend checking the specific product instructions as some items may have special care requirements for optimal longevity.

items.question: How do I choose the right product for my baby's age?
items.answer: Each product page includes recommended age ranges and developmental milestones. Generally, newborns start with slow-flow nipples, transitioning to faster flows as they grow. Our sippy cups and tableware are designed for babies 6 months and older starting solids.
